member.name: T:backend.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Controller for handling authentication operations.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.AuthController.#ctor(backend.Services.IBlackboardService,backend.Repositories.IUserRepository)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AuthController class.
member.param: The user repository for persisting username on login.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.AuthController.Login(backend.Dtos.LoginRequestDto)
member.summary: Authenticates a user with the provided credentials.
member.param: The login request containing username and password.
member.returns: A login response with authentication result and session cookie if successful.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.AuthController.Me(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the current authenticated user's information.
member.param: The session cookie from the X-Session-Cookie header.
member.returns: User response containing user details or error message.

member.name: T:backend.Controllers.CalendarController
member.summary: Controller to expose Blackboard calendar items without persistence.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.CalendarController.#ctor(backend.Services.IBlackboardService)
member.summary: Initializes the controller with Blackboard service dependency.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.CalendarController.Get(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String)
member.summary: Gets calendar items from Blackboard in a 16-week window starting at the first day of the month for the provided date.
member.param: Reference date used to calculate the window.
member.returns: List of mapped calendar items.

member.name: T:backend.Controllers.EventsController
member.summary: Controller for managing user calendar events.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.EventsController.#ctor(backend.Repositories.IUserRepository,backend.Services.IBlackboardService)
member.summary: Initializes the controller with dependencies.
member.param: The user repository for event operations.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.EventsController.GetSessionCookie
member.summary: Gets the session cookie from the request headers.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.EventsController.ValidateSessionAsync
member.summary: Validates the session cookie and returns the username.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.EventsController.ValidateEventData(System.String,System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.String)
member.summary: Validates event data.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.EventsController.MapToDto(backend.Models.Event)
member.summary: Maps an Event model to EventDto.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.EventsController.GetAll(System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Gets all events for the authenticated user.
member.param: Optional filter for events starting after this date.
Optional filter for events ending before this date.
member.returns: List of events.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.EventsController.GetById(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a specific event by ID.
member.returns: The event details.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.EventsController.Create(backend.Dtos.CreateEventDto,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new event.
member.returns: The created event with 201 status.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.EventsController.Update(System.String,backend.Dtos.UpdateEventDto,System.String)
member.summary: Updates an existing event.
member.returns: 200 OK with the updated event on success.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.EventsController.Delete(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Deletes an event.
member.returns: 204 No Content on success.

member.name: T:backend.Controllers.GoogleAuthController
member.summary: Controller for Google OAuth2 connect/callback flow to link Google accounts to user accounts.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.GoogleAuthController.#ctor(backend.Repositories.IUserRepository,backend.Services.IBlackboardService,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: User repository used to fetch and persist user accounts.
Service for validating Blackboard sessions and retrieving user info.
Application configuration containing Google OAuth settings.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.GoogleAuthController.Connect(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the Google OAuth2 authorization URL for the frontend to redirect the user and obtain consent. Uses the minimal calendar events scope and requests offline access (refresh token). Stores the Blackboard session temporarily to retrieve it in the callback.
member.param: Optional session cookie extracted from the 'X-Session-Cookie' header; falls back to 'Cookie' header.
member.returns: 200 OK with the authorization URL and state token, or 400/500 on error.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.GoogleAuthController.Callback(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: OAuth2 callback endpoint that exchanges the authorization for tokens and links the Google account (stores refresh token) to the current authenticated user (identified via state token).
member.param: State token used to correlate the OAuth flow with the originating session.
member.returns: 200 OK on success (Google account linked), or 400/500 with error details.

member.name: T:backend.Controllers.GoogleCalendarController
member.summary: Controller for Google Calendar integration endpoints (status and export operations).

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.GoogleCalendarController.#ctor(backend.Services.IGoogleCalendarService,backend.Repositories.IUserRepository,backend.Services.IBlackboardService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Service that handles Google Calendar export operations.
Service used to validate Blackboard sessions and fetch calendar items.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.GoogleCalendarController.Status(System.String)
member.summary: Returns whether the current Blackboard-authenticated user has a valid Google account linked. Validates the refresh token by attempting to refresh the access token.
member.param: Optional session cookie extracted from the 'X-Session-Cookie' header; falls back to 'Cookie' header.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.GoogleCalendarController.Export(System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Exports calendar items from Blackboard to the user's Google Calendar synchronously. Returns a summary with counts of created, updated and failed events.
member.param: Optional session cookie extracted from the 'X-Session-Cookie' header; falls back to 'Cookie' header.
Optional reference date to export the 16-week window starting at the first day of the month for this date. Defaults to now.

member.name: T:backend.Controllers.ImageProxyController
member.summary: Proxy controller to fetch images from Blackboard, forwarding session token when provided. Uses token from X-Session-Cookie header

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.ImageProxyController.#ctor(backend.Services.IBlackboardService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{backend.Controllers.ImageProxyController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ImageProxyController.
member.param: The Blackboard service for proxying image requests.

member.name: M:backend.Controllers.ImageProxyController.Get(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Proxies an image request from Blackboard and returns the image stream as a blob. Accepts token only via X-Session-Cookie header
member.param: The URL of the image to proxy.
member.returns: Image stream (200), 400 (bad request), 401 (unauthorized), or 404 (not found).

member.name: T:backend.Data.MongoDbContext
member.summary: MongoDB database context for data access operations.

member.name: M:backend.Data.MongoDbContext.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MongoDbContext class.
member.param: The application configuration containing database connection strings.

member.name: P:backend.Data.MongoDbContext.Users
member.summary: Gets the users collection from the MongoDB database.

member.name: T:backend.Dtos.CalendarItemDto
member.summary: Clean calendar event item mapped from Blackboard raw calendar entries.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CalendarItemDto.CalendarId
member.summary: Gets the calendar item identifier mapped from the Blackboard 'id' field.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CalendarItemDto.Title
member.summary: Gets the event title.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CalendarItemDto.Start
member.summary: Gets the event start date/time in UTC.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CalendarItemDto.End
member.summary: Gets the event end date/time in UTC.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CalendarItemDto.Location
member.summary: Gets the physical or virtual location of the event.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CalendarItemDto.Category
member.summary: Gets the event category type mapped from Blackboard 'type' field. Values: Course, GradebookColumn, Institution, OfficeHours, Personal.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CalendarItemDto.Subject
member.summary: Gets the cleaned subject/course name extracted from the calendar name using regex. Empty for Institution/Personal categories.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CalendarItemDto.Color
member.summary: Gets the hexadecimal color code for visual representation.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CalendarItemDto.Description
member.summary: Gets the optional event description.

member.name: T:backend.Dtos.CreateEventDto
member.summary: Data transfer object for creating a new event.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CreateEventDto.Title
member.summary: The title of the event.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CreateEventDto.Subject
member.summary: Optional subject or course name.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CreateEventDto.Start
member.summary: The start date and time in UTC.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CreateEventDto.End
member.summary: The end date and time in UTC.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CreateEventDto.Location
member.summary: Optional location of the event.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CreateEventDto.Color
member.summary: The color code in hexadecimal format (e.g., #FF5733).

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.CreateEventDto.Category
member.summary: The category of the event.

member.name: T:backend.Dtos.EventDto
member.summary: Data transfer object for event responses.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.EventDto.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of the event.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.EventDto.Title
member.summary: Gets the title of the event.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.EventDto.Subject
member.summary: Gets the optional subject or course name associated with the event.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.EventDto.Start
member.summary: Gets the start date and time of the event in UTC.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.EventDto.End
member.summary: Gets the end date and time of the event in UTC.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.EventDto.Location
member.summary: Gets the optional physical or virtual location of the event.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.EventDto.Color
member.summary: Gets the hexadecimal color code for the event.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.EventDto.Category
member.summary: Gets the category of the event.

member.name: T:backend.Dtos.ExportSummaryDto
member.summary: Summary of an export operation to Google Calendar. Contains counts of created, updated and failed events and any error messages.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.ExportSummaryDto.Created
member.summary: Number of events created in Google Calendar.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.ExportSummaryDto.Updated
member.summary: Number of events updated in Google Calendar.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.ExportSummaryDto.Failed
member.summary: Number of events that failed to be exported.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.ExportSummaryDto.Errors
member.summary: List of error messages for failed items, if any.

member.name: T:backend.Dtos.GoogleConnectResponse
member.summary: Response returned by the Google connect endpoint containing the authorization URL and state token.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.GoogleConnectResponse.Url
member.summary: Authorization URL for the frontend to redirect the user to Google OAuth2 consent screen.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.GoogleConnectResponse.StateToken
member.summary: State token that identifies the originating session for the OAuth flow.

member.name: T:backend.Dtos.GoogleStatusDto
member.summary: Represents whether a user has a Google account connected and optionally the email associated with it.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.GoogleStatusDto.IsConnected
member.summary: Whether the user has a Google account connected.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.GoogleStatusDto.Email
member.summary: Email address of the connected Google account, if available.

member.name: T:backend.Dtos.LoginRequestDto
member.summary: Data transfer object for login requests.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.LoginRequestDto.Username
member.summary: The username for authentication.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.LoginRequestDto.Password
member.summary: The password for authentication.

member.name: T:backend.Dtos.LoginResponseDto
member.summary: Data transfer object for login responses.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.LoginResponseDto.IsSuccess
member.summary: Indicates whether the authentication was successful.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.LoginResponseDto.Message
member.summary: The response message describing the authentication result.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.LoginResponseDto.SessionCookie
member.summary: The session cookie for authenticated requests.

member.name: T:backend.Dtos.UpdateEventDto
member.summary: Data transfer object for updating an existing event. All fields are optional to allow partial updates.
member.param: The start date and time in UTC.
The end date and time in UTC.
The color code in hexadecimal format (e.g., #FF5733).

member.name: M:backend.Dtos.UpdateEventDto.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{backend.Enums.CalendarCategory})
member.summary: Data transfer object for updating an existing event. All fields are optional to allow partial updates.
member.param: The start date and time in UTC.
The end date and time in UTC.
The color code in hexadecimal format (e.g., #FF5733).

member.summary: The title of the event.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.UpdateEventDto.Subject
member.summary: Optional subject or course name.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.UpdateEventDto.Start
member.summary: The start date and time in UTC.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.UpdateEventDto.End
member.summary: The end date and time in UTC.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.UpdateEventDto.Location
member.summary: Optional location of the event.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.UpdateEventDto.Color
member.summary: The color code in hexadecimal format (e.g., #FF5733).

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.UpdateEventDto.Category
member.summary: The category of the event.

member.name: T:backend.Dtos.UserResponseDto
member.summary: Data transfer object for user response information.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.UserResponseDto.IsSuccess
member.summary: Indicates whether the user retrieval was successful.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.UserResponseDto.Message
member.summary: The response message describing the operation result.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.UserResponseDto.UserData
member.summary: The user detail information if the operation was successful.

member.name: T:backend.Dtos.UserDetailDto
member.summary: Data transfer object containing detailed user information.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.UserDetailDto.Given
member.summary: The user's given name.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.UserDetailDto.Family
member.summary: The user's family name.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.UserDetailDto.Email
member.summary: The user's email address.

member.name: P:backend.Dtos.UserDetailDto.Avatar
member.summary: The URL to the user's avatar image.

member.name: T:backend.Enums.CalendarCategory
member.summary: Represents the category types for calendar events from Blackboard.

member.name: F:backend.Enums.CalendarCategory.Course
member.summary: Calendar event for a course.

member.name: F:backend.Enums.CalendarCategory.GradebookColumn
member.summary: Calendar event for a gradebook column.

member.name: F:backend.Enums.CalendarCategory.Institution
member.summary: Calendar event for an institution.

member.name: F:backend.Enums.CalendarCategory.OfficeHours
member.summary: Calendar event for office hours.

member.name: F:backend.Enums.CalendarCategory.Personal
member.summary: Calendar event for personal use.

member.name: T:backend.Models.Event
member.summary: Represents a calendar event belonging to a user.

member.name: P:backend.Models.Event.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier of the event (GUID as string).

member.name: P:backend.Models.Event.Title
member.summary: The title of the event.

member.name: P:backend.Models.Event.Subject
member.summary: Optional subject or course name.

member.name: P:backend.Models.Event.Start
member.summary: The start date and time in UTC.

member.name: P:backend.Models.Event.End
member.summary: The end date and time in UTC.

member.name: P:backend.Models.Event.Location
member.summary: Optional location of the event.

member.name: P:backend.Models.Event.Color
member.summary: The color code in hexadecimal format (e.g., #FF5733).

member.name: P:backend.Models.Event.Category
member.summary: The category of the event.

member.name: T:backend.Models.GoogleAccount
member.summary: Represents a Google account linked to a user. Stored as a subdocument inside the User document.
Represents a Google account linked to a user. Stored as a subdocument inside the User document.

member.name: P:backend.Models.GoogleAccount.GoogleId
member.summary: The unique Google account identifier (sub).

member.name: P:backend.Models.GoogleAccount.Email
member.summary: Email address associated with the Google account.

member.name: P:backend.Models.GoogleAccount.RefreshToken
member.summary: OAuth2 refresh token used to obtain new access tokens.

member.name: P:backend.Models.GoogleAccount.AccessToken
member.summary: Currently cached access token if available.

member.name: P:backend.Models.GoogleAccount.AccessTokenExpiry
member.summary: Expiration time of the cached access token (UTC).

member.name: P:backend.Models.GoogleAccount.Scopes
member.summary: OAuth scopes granted for this account.

member.name: T:backend.Models.User
member.summary: Represents a user entity stored in MongoDB.

member.name: P:backend.Models.User.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier of the user.

member.name: P:backend.Models.User.Username
member.summary: The username to persist.

member.name: P:backend.Models.User.Email
member.summary: Optional Blackboard email (queried after login) to help correlate sessions.

member.name: P:backend.Models.User.GoogleAccount
member.summary: Optional linked Google account data (tokens, ids, scopes).

member.name: P:backend.Models.User.Events
member.summary: List of calendar events belonging to the user.

member.name: T:backend.Repositories.IUserRepository
member.summary: Interface for user repository operations.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.IUserRepository.UpsertByUsernameAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Upserts a user document containing the username and optional email.
member.param: The username to persist or update.
Optional email to store for the user (from Blackboard).

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.IUserRepository.GetByUsernameAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a user by username.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.IUserRepository.GetByEmailAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a user by email.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.IUserRepository.UpsertGoogleAccountAsync(System.String,backend.Models.GoogleAccount)
member.summary: Upserts the Google account subdocument for the specified username.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.IUserRepository.RemoveGoogleAccountAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the Google account linkage for a user.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.IUserRepository.GetUserEventsAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves all events for a user.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.IUserRepository.GetEventByIdAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific event by ID for a user.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.IUserRepository.AddEventAsync(System.String,backend.Models.Event)
member.summary: Adds a new event to a user's events list.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.IUserRepository.UpdateEventAsync(System.String,backend.Models.Event)
member.summary: Updates an existing event in a user's events list.
member.returns: True if the event was updated, false if not found.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.IUserRepository.DeleteEventAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Deletes an event from a user's events list.
member.param: The ID of the event to delete.

member.name: T:backend.Repositories.UserRepository
member.summary: Repository implementation for user persistence.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.UserRepository.#ctor(backend.Data.MongoDbContext,backend.Services.ITokenProtector)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class and ensures the username index.
member.param: Token protector for encrypting/decrypting stored Google tokens.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.UserRepository.UpsertByUsernameAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Upserts a document that contains the username and optional email.
member.param: Optional email to associate with the username (from Blackboard).

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.UserRepository.GetByUsernameAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Finds a user document by username.
member.returns: User document or null if not found.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.UserRepository.GetByEmailAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Finds a user document by email.
member.returns: User document or null if not found.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.UserRepository.UpsertGoogleAccountAsync(System.String,backend.Models.GoogleAccount)
member.summary: Upserts the Google account subdocument for the specified username.
member.param: Username whose Google account will be set.
GoogleAccount object to persist (tokens are protected before saving).

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.UserRepository.RemoveGoogleAccountAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the Google account linkage for a user.
member.param: Username to remove the Google account for.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.UserRepository.GetUserEventsAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves all events for a user.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.UserRepository.GetEventByIdAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific event by ID for a user.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.UserRepository.AddEventAsync(System.String,backend.Models.Event)
member.summary: Adds a new event to a user's events list using $push.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.UserRepository.UpdateEventAsync(System.String,backend.Models.Event)
member.summary: Updates an existing event in a user's events list using positional operator.

member.name: M:backend.Repositories.UserRepository.DeleteEventAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Deletes an event from a user's events list using $pull.
member.param: The ID of the event to delete.

member.name: T:backend.Services.BlackboardService
member.summary: Service for Blackboard authentication and data retrieval operations.

member.name: M:backend.Services.BlackboardService.AuthenticateAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Authenticates a user with Blackboard credentials.
member.returns: A login response containing authentication status and session cookie if successful.

member.name: M:backend.Services.BlackboardService.GetUserDataAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves user data from Blackboard using a session cookie.
member.param: The session cookie from a successful authentication.
member.returns: A user response containing user information if successful.

member.name: M:backend.Services.BlackboardService.GetProxiedImageResponseAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a proxied image response from Blackboard.
member.param: The URL of the image to proxy.
The optional Accept header for the image request.
member.returns: The proxied HTTP response message or null if unsuccessful.

member.name: M:backend.Services.BlackboardService.GetCalendarItemsAsync(System.DateTime,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves and maps calendar items from Blackboard within a 16-week window starting at the first day of the month for the provided date.
member.param: Reference date to compute the window.
member.returns: Mapped calendar items.

member.name: T:backend.Services.GoogleCalendarService
member.summary: Service responsible for exporting events to Google Calendar and handling token refresh. Uses pure HttpClient approach for compatibility with net10.0 and Google Apis 1.8.1.

member.name: M:backend.Services.GoogleCalendarService.#ctor(backend.Repositories.IUserRepository,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{backend.Services.GoogleCalendarService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: User repository for reading and storing Google account information.
Application configuration to obtain Google OAuth settings.

member.name: M:backend.Services.GoogleCalendarService.ExportEventsAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{backend.Dtos.CalendarItemDto})
member.summary: Exports the specified calendar items to the user's Google Calendar. Returns a summary with counts of created, updated and failed events.
member.param: Local username to export events for.
member.returns: An summarizing the export operation.

member.name: M:backend.Services.GoogleCalendarService.GetClosestGoogleColorId(System.String)
member.summary: Map a hex color string to the closest Google Calendar event color id ("1".."11"). Returns null if invalid/unsupported.

member.name: M:backend.Services.GoogleCalendarService.ValidateTokenAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Validates the Google refresh token by attempting to refresh the access token. Returns true if valid, false if expired. Updates the access token in the database if successful.

member.name: M:backend.Services.GoogleCalendarService.EnsureAccessTokenAsync(backend.Models.User)
member.summary: Ensures a valid access token is available for the given user, refreshing if necessary. Throws if a refresh fails or no token can be obtained.
member.param: User whose Google account should be used to obtain a token.

member.name: T:backend.Services.IBlackboardService
member.summary: Interface for Blackboard authentication and data retrieval services.

member.name: M:backend.Services.IBlackboardService.AuthenticateAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Authenticates a user with Blackboard credentials.
member.returns: A login response containing authentication status and session cookie if successful.

member.name: M:backend.Services.IBlackboardService.GetUserDataAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves user data from Blackboard using a session cookie.
member.param: The session cookie from a successful authentication.
member.returns: A user response containing user information if successful.

member.name: M:backend.Services.IBlackboardService.GetProxiedImageResponseAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a proxied image response from Blackboard.
member.param: The URL of the image to proxy.
The optional Accept header for the image request.
member.returns: The proxied HTTP response message or null if unsuccessful.

member.name: M:backend.Services.IBlackboardService.GetCalendarItemsAsync(System.DateTime,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves calendar items within the calculated range using Blackboard public calendar API.
member.param: Reference date to calculate the start of month and 16-week window.
member.returns: Collection of mapped calendar items.

member.name: T:backend.Services.IGoogleCalendarService
member.summary: Service abstraction for exporting events to Google Calendar.

member.name: M:backend.Services.IGoogleCalendarService.ExportEventsAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{backend.Dtos.CalendarItemDto})
member.summary: Exports the specified calendar items to the Google Calendar of .
member.param: Local username whose calendar to export to.

member.name: M:backend.Services.IGoogleCalendarService.ValidateTokenAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Validates the Google refresh token by attempting to refresh the access token. Returns true if the token is valid, false if it has expired or is invalid.

member.name: T:backend.Services.ITokenProtector
member.summary: Abstraction for protecting (encrypting) and unprotecting short-lived tokens.

member.name: M:backend.Services.ITokenProtector.Protect(System.String)
member.summary: Protects (encrypts) the given plaintext token. Returns empty string for null/empty input.

member.name: M:backend.Services.ITokenProtector.Unprotect(System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to unprotect (decrypt) the token. Returns original input in case of failure.

member.name: T:backend.Services.TokenProtector
member.summary: Protects and unprotects tokens using ASP.NET Core data protection.

member.name: M:backend.Services.TokenProtector.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.DataProtection.IDataProtectionProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Data protection provider used to create a scoped protector.

member.name: M:backend.Services.TokenProtector.Protect(System.String)
member.summary: Protects (encrypts) the provided plaintext token. Returns empty string for null or empty input.

member.name: M:backend.Services.TokenProtector.Unprotect(System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to unprotect (decrypt) the token; returns original input on failure.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
member.returns: The normalized documentation comment ID.
